conversation_context.user_goal: Add a separate static deobfuscation lane to find higher-level read/export entrypoints without replacing runtime probing.
user_constraints: Keep runtime probing as the source of truth.
Treat static deob as a separate track rather than a strategy pivot.
decisions: This track is a side-track, not a replacement for the current runtime-first approach.
Primary goal is entrypoint hunt, not full readable bundle restoration.
conversation_context.latest_user_request: Implement the static deob side-track plan.
